summary: POD (Proof of Delivery) feature testing complete. All core features working correctly: mandatory photo validation in Driver Portal POD modal, photo/signature saved to /pod folder, Admin and Pharmacy can view POD details in order modal, Delivery Instructions field available in order creation.
seed_data_creation: Used existing order 1 (RX-EB0AAB40) for POD test - submitted with photo and signature. Assigned order 2 to driver for UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: POD feature is fully implemented. Order 1 has POD photo and signature saved. Driver needs to scan QR code before completing delivery (scannedSet is in-memory per session). POD files are saved to /app/rxexpresss-solution/RxExpresss.API/wwwroot/pod/

features_tested.Driver Portal POD modal requires photo: PASS - Modal shows 'Photo Proof *' with red asterisk, 'Photo is required for delivery completion' message in red
features_tested.Driver Portal POD photo capture: PASS - Backend validates photoBase64 is required, returns error if missing
features_tested.Driver Portal POD signature optional: PASS - Signature marked as '(optional)' with helper text about leave at door instructions
features_tested.Admin Order Details shows POD: PASS - Order detail modal shows 'Proof of Delivery' section with photo and signature images when order is delivered
features_tested.Admin Order Details shows signature: PASS - Signature image visible in POD section
features_tested.Pharmacy Order Details shows POD: PASS - Same POD section visible in pharmacy order detail modal
features_tested.Pharmacy can view order details by click: PASS - Clicking order number opens detail modal with all order info including POD
features_tested.Order list shows POD indicator: PASS - Driver history shows 📷 POD badge for orders with photoUrl
features_tested.Delivery instructions field in order cre: PASS - Delivery Instructions field with placeholder 'e.g. Leave at door, with doorman, etc.' in Create Order modal

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/driver-portal/deliveries/{id}/pod - PASS (validates mandatory photo, accepts optional signature)
POST /api/driver-portal/deliveries/{id}/pod without photo - PASS (returns 400 'Photo proof is required')
GET /api/orders/{id} - PASS (includes photoUrl, signatureUrl, recipientNameSigned fields)
GET /api/driver-portal/history - PASS (includes photoUrl for history items)
ui_flows_tested: Admin login -> Orders page -> Click order number -> Order Detail modal with POD section
Pharmacy login -> Dashboard -> Click order number -> Order Detail modal with POD section
Driver login -> Active Deliveries -> Scan Package -> Complete Delivery button -> POD modal with mandatory photo
